goal_text:
You are planning your trip in Cambridge.
You are looking for places to go in town. The attraction should be in the 'east'.
Make sure you get 'address' and 'postcode'.
You are also looking for a place to dine. The restaurant should serve 'gastropub' food and should be 'in the same area as the attraction'.
Once you find the 'restaurant' you want to book a table for '1 people' at '17:45' on 'saturday'.
Make sure you get the 'reference number'.

message: You are planning your trip in Cambridge
You are looking for places to go in town. The attraction should be in the east
Make sure you get address and postcode
You are also looking for a place to dine. The restaurant should serve gastropub food and should be in the same area as the attraction
Once you find the restaurant you want to book a table for 1 people at 17:45 on saturday
Make sure you get the reference number
